title: Littleness No Cause Of Leanness.
content:
One feeds on lard, and yet is lean,
    And I but feasting with a bean
    Grow fat and smooth. The reason is:
    Jove prospers my meat more than his.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Littleness No Cause Of Leanness.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
